views.name: Formula 21.42b Relationship
views.definition: N p n s N = n ell n y n p n s sigma GF times L 2 sigma GF times Y 2 sigma GF times L times Y 2 year-location combinations is replicated as plots of sigs each, for a total of sigs per family.
views.definition_zh: 这条关系式把左侧目标量和右侧条件连接起来，适合作为理解本公式符号关系的起点。
views.supporting_formula_latex: \begin{align*}\sigma^{2}(\epsilon)&=\frac{\sigma_{GF\times L}^{2}}{n_\ell}+\frac{\sigma_{GF\times Y}^{2}}{n_{y}}+\frac{\sigma_{GF\times L\times Y}^{2}}{n_\ell n_{y}}+\frac{\sigma_{E_{p}}^{2}}{n_\ell n_{y} n_{p}}+\frac{\sigma_{Gw}^{2}+\sigma_{E_{s}}^{2}}{n_\ell n_{y} n_{p} n_{s}}\\&=\left(\frac{1}{N}\right)\left[\sigma_{Gw}^{2}+\sigma_{E_{s}}^{2}+n_{s}\sigma_{E_{p}}^{2}+n_{p} n_{s}\left(n_{y}\sigma_{GF\times L}^{2}+n_\ell\sigma_{GF\times Y}^{2}+\sigma_{GF\times L\times Y}^{2}\right)\right]\end{align*}

prerequisite_concepts.name: Benefit
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Benefit is the main quantity to read from this equation; the right-hand side shows which terms determine it.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Benefit 是这条公式要读出的核心量；等号右侧说明它由哪些条件和符号共同决定。

prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.

introduced_concepts.name: Time
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 21.55 Count
introduced_concepts.definition: A discrete number of items, individuals, or events.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 21.55 Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter describing how quickly a process occurs.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 描述某个过程发生快慢的参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

introduced_concepts.name: Selection Coefficient
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter measuring the strength of selection.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量选择强度的参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Time
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Mutation Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter measuring the probability of mutation per generation.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量每一代发生突变概率的参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Tau
introduced_concepts.definition: Tau places the symbol back in the model context: it marks the object, class, or condition being described.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Tau 帮你把符号放回模型语境中：它标记的是公式正在描述的对象、类别或条件。

introduced_concepts.name: L

introduced_concepts.definition_zh: L 帮你把符号放回模型语境中：它标记的是公式正在描述的对象、类别或条件。
